emails.subject: Dinner
emails.body: Dinner Had a good time with your pops last night. I told him no one was better than you. Thanks for the email. H Heather Kroll

emails.subject: Dinner

emails.subject: RE: Dinner
emails.body: RE: Dinner Good Morning, I didn't know you were going last night! Where did you go? To: Stepenovitch, Joe

emails.subject: RE: Dinner
emails.body: RE: Dinner A place up by fipple's offices called fathom. Owned by the breakers. Very good Heather Kroll
